title: bulbophyllum makoyanum
intro: Bulbophyllum makoyanum, also known as the Makoyan's Bulbophyllum, is a species of orchid native to the Philippines. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum makoyanum include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and promoting the removal of mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusions or decoctions, and it is commonly used in traditional Filipino medicine to treat various respiratory ailments.
